  1. Home

  3. Our history

Our history

Kaiser Permanente’s groundbreaking integrated care model has evolved through the decades — and we’re still improving care delivery for our members to this day.

How we evolved

Discover our roots in the Great Depression and World War II shipyards and see how we’ve been revolutionizing care delivery since 1945.

See how we got started

Pioneers and groundbreakers

Our integrated care model

Innovation and research

Early leaders in equity and inclusion

Groundbreaking moments

Explore how people, medicine, and technology came together to shape Kaiser Permanente's mission: to provide high-quality, affordable health care services and to improve the health of our members and the communities we serve.

View the timeline

Want to learn more about Kaiser Permanente history?

Contact our historian
